title: Education page on my Website Tour  - Stoned

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a tour of his personal education website page, covering his four-point critique of the current school system (lecturing, K-12 pacing, A-F grading, mandatory attendance) and demonstrating his resources: a 1,618-page history timeline, a curated collection of 1,159 free audiobooks organized by country and category, and world origin stories totaling over 24,000 pages of text. He advocates for self-directed, digitally-delivered learning where students absorb content at their own pace—such as listening to lectures while biking—then share what they learned through videos and personal websites.
enrichment.speaker: mixed

stances.position: outdated; students should listen digitally on their own time, not sit through live lectures
forces everyone to learn the same material at the same pace; should let individuals advance freely
too subjective and teacher-dependent; should be replaced with standardized percentage-based tests, website quality, and video knowledge
unnecessary; people should be free to learn where and when they choose
the most important subject; knowing events in context lets you classify and understand everything else
fascinating and undervalued; past cultures were more exciting and diverse than today
highly effective; Kindle and Mac text-to-speech enable portable, searchable, efficient learning
